title: helichrysum minoum
intro: Helichrysum minoum, also known as the Minous or Minou's Helichrysum, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow and daisy-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for wound healing, reducing inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Helichrysum minoum include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
